salientSummary: Added 'devin' agent config entry to src/agents.ts with displayName 'Devin for Terminal', skillsDir '.devin/skills', globalSkillsDir join(configHome, 'devin/skills'), and detection via existsSync(join(configHome, 'devin')). This resolved the transient type error from the devin-type feature. All 402 tests pass, type-check shows only the 6 pre-existing errors, and formatting is clean.
whatWasImplemented: Added devin config object to the agents record in src/agents.ts between deepagents and droid (alphabetical order). Follows the goose pattern (non-universal agent + XDG config paths): name 'devin', displayName 'Devin for Terminal', skillsDir '.devin/skills', globalSkillsDir join(configHome, 'devin/skills') resolving to ~/.config/devin/skills, detectInstalled checks existsSync(join(configHome, 'devin')). isUniversalAgent('devin') returns false because skillsDir !== '.agents/skills'.

commandsRun.observation: 6 pre-existing type errors only (git.ts, wellknown.ts, skills.ts). The transient 'devin' missing property error is resolved.
All 402 tests pass across 26 test files in 16.54s
All matched files use Prettier code style!
